— Check it out, a large whiplash from the sparks of the deep craters of the moon! Mooninite two to flip you the finger, Err is the total embodiment of what society has associated with short people in the snarks of an attitude! All the hot-blooded, aggressive, and chaotic energy from this creature is not much of a match for the people in this floating piece of rock with oceans. Yeah, he thinks he's actual tough shit compared to all the Earth has to offer in this stupid place! He isn't the brightest being out there (come on, he's so self-aware), he does know his capabilities of making sure that this neighborhood knows his name in the grand scheme of things! When anything annoys Err, he will attack it. And there are many things that annoy him from face to face. But if you happen to be someone who just don't give a fuck about authority and knows how to party, you'll be on his good side!

He's cool, honestly. Might even offer you a blunt of moonajuana! Just...don't underestimate him.  

┈─★

— YAP SES
